path: Problem: Generate the next sequential number based on the current maximum in a column while allowing blanks based on a condition
Action: IF to conditionally return blank; MAX over a range; add 1 to increment

Observation: Including the current cell (or any cell that depends on the formula) inside the MAX range creates a circular reference and can yield incorrect displayed results (e.g., 000) even though partial evaluation (F9) shows the expected numeric value
